properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let me walk, blessed Lord, in the way Thou hast gone, Leading straight to the land above; Giving cheer everywhere, to the sad and the lone, Fill my way every day with love.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Fill my way every day with love, As I walk with the heavenly Dove; Let me go all the while, with a song and a smile, Fill my way every day with love.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Keep me close to the side of my Saviour and Guide, Let me never in darkness rove; Keep my path free from wrath, and my soul satisfied, Fill my way every day with love.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Soon the race will be o’er, and I’ll travel no more, But abide in my home above; Let me sing, blessed King, all the way to the shore, Fill my way every day with love.
